entries.title: Anthropic Urges Governments to Secure Power to Halt Dangerous AI
entries.summary: The U.S. federal government and other governments should address the risks posed by artificial intelligence (AI) by securing the legal authority to block dangerous deployments and by increasing society’s resilience, Anthropic said in a Wednesday (June 10) press release. Governments should also prepare workers and the economy for the impact of AI and ensure that the […] The post Anthropic Urg

entries.title: Visa Launches AI and Stablecoin Tools to Power Agentic Commerce
entries.summary: Visa announced new artificial intelligence (AI), stablecoin and token initiatives Wednesday (June 10). While unveiling these initiatives at Visa Payments Forum 2026, the company said they are designed to help clients unlock a new generation of commerce that is fast, automated and intelligent, it said in a Wednesday press release. “AI is transforming the front end […] The post Visa Launches A

entries.title: Microsoft Balks at Anthropic’s Claude Fable 5 Data Retention Policy
entries.summary: Microsoft is limiting employees’ use of Anthropic’s Claude Fable 5 while its legal teams evaluate changes to Anthropic’s data retention requirements, Reuters reported Wednesday (June 10), citing a paywalled article by The Verge. Anthropic’s data retention policy for the newly released Claude Fable 5, which is a Mythos-class model, includes retaining prompts and outputs for 30 days on every [&#8230

entries.title: Fifth Third Joins Anthropic’s Project Glasswing
entries.summary: Fifth Third Bancorp was invited to join Anthropic’s Project Glasswing cybersecurity initiative, Seeking Alpha reported Wednesday (June 10). The bank’s chief financial officer, Bryan Preston, said at the Morgan Stanley U.S. Financials Conference that Fifth Third was granted access to the initiative within the past several weeks, according to the report. “We think it was a reflection of just the rol

entries.title: FSB guides banks on resposible adoption of AI
entries.summary: The Financial Stability Council is inviting feedback on a new consultation on sound practices for the responsible adoption of artificial intelligence within the financial sector.

entries.title: Mastercard launches Agent Pay for Machines
entries.summary: Mastercard has lined up a host of firms behind its latest AI commerce tool, Agent Pay for Machines (AP4M).

entries.title: Capsa AI raises $18m to solve private capital's data problem
entries.summary: Capsa AI, a startup building what it calls an artificial intelligence operating system for private capital, has raised $18 million in Series A funding.

entries.title: Presidio launches AI governance platform for financial services
entries.summary: Financial institutions are entering a new operating model shaped by AI, automation, and rising expectations for more personalized, efficient, and compliant client experiences.

entries.title: Nasdaq Verafin adds new members to agentic AI workforce
entries.summary: Nasdaq's anti-financial crime unit Verafin has expanded its suite of agentic AI digital workers with new AML and fraud analysts.

entries.title: Plum rolls out AI-powered money guidance
entries.summary: Smart money app Plum has launched a new financial guidance service called Plum Plan, transforming the way people build, manage and grow their wealth over their lifetime.

entries.title: Sunrate delivers agentic global payments
entries.summary: SUNRATE, the global payment and treasury management platform, today unveiled Sunrate.AI at SuperAI, defining ‘Agentic Global Payments’ — a new category of AI-native global payment infrastructure built to automate and manage complex enterprise workflows.

entries.title: Phonepe introduces AI-powered payment page creator
entries.summary: PhonePe today announced the launch of SmartPages, an AI-powered payment page creator built natively into the PhonePe Payment Gateway (PG) dashboard.

entries.title: Cross-currency payments between the euro area, Denmark and Sweden go live
entries.summary: Thanks to the cross-currency service implemented in the TARGET Instant Payment Settlement (TIPS) system, payment service providers (PSPs) can settle payments between TIPS accounts denominated in different currencies (the euro, the Danish krone and the Swedish krona).

entries.title: Kalshi Moves to Screen Potential Insiders Before Trades Are Placed
entries.summary: Prediction market operator Kalshi is introducing a new measure designed to identify potential insiders before trades are placed. The platform will begin collecting employment information from traders seeking access to certain contracts. The policy applies to markets that the company considers vulnerable to insider information or manipulation and forms part of a broader market integrity initiative

entries.title: OpenPayd to Go Public via $276M SPAC Deal, Targets Nasdaq Listing
entries.summary: OpenPayd and Titan Acquisition Corp have entered into a definitive business combination agreement, the companies said today (Monday). Under the deal, OpenPayd is expected to become a publicly listed company on Nasdaq and will trade under the ticker “OP” following completion. OpenPayd provides embedded finance infrastructure spanning FX, domestic and cross-border payments, open banking, and stablec

entries.title: eToro Stock Hits Seven-Month High as Rally Catches Up to Goldman's Target
entries.summary: eToro (NASDAQ: ETOR ) shares closed at their highest level in seven months on Friday, extending a recovery that has lifted the retail brokerage about 70% from the record lows it touched in February. The stock rose more than 5% to finish just below $42, and traded as high as $43.32 during the session, its strongest level since early December. eToro’s Climb Back From February's Record Lows The lates

entries.title: Pagaya sues Klarna over alleged trade secret misappropriation
entries.summary: The BNPL firm’s objective was to “absorb Pagaya’s trade secrets, use them to build its own competing capabilities, and cut Pagaya out,” the underwriting fintech alleged.

entries.title: 4 reasons the Visa-Mastercard pact survived
entries.summary: Here’s the thinking of a federal judge who approved the settlement covering merchants who sued Visa and Mastercard over interchange fees.

entries.title: Bolt loses leaders
entries.summary: Two top executives have exited the checkout company in recent weeks as the business reshapes its strategy with AI.

entries.title: Adyen taps North America chief
entries.summary: The digital payments player appointed a new president to oversee operations in North America, where the Dutch company has been taking on U.S. rivals.
